Part.Source:
If &default = 'S' //Criar Padrão &sdtComponentesFrete.Clear() RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon168_ComponentesFrete, &ComponentesFrete) &sdtComponentesFrete.FromJson(&ComponentesFrete)
If &sdtComponentesFrete.Count > 1 For &sdtComponentesFreteItem in &sdtComponentesFrete New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = &sdtComponentesFreteItem.CtePreCod CteNomPreCom = &sdtComponentesFreteItem.CteNomPreCom CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = &sdtComponentesFreteItem.CteDesIcmsCom CtePrePagCom = &sdtComponentesFreteItem.CtePrePagCom Endnew commit EndFor
Else
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 1 CteNomPreCom = 'FRETE PESO' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 2 CteNomPreCom = 'FRETE VALOR' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 3 CteNomPreCom = 'DIÁRIA' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 4 CteNomPreCom = 'PEDÁGIO' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 5 CteNomPreCom = 'DESCARGA' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 6 CteNomPreCom = 'DIF. DESCARGA' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 7 CteNomPreCom = 'OUTROS' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 8 CteNomPreCom = 'DIF. FRETE' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CtePreCod = 9 CteNomPreCom = 'RETORNO VAZIO' CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False Endnew EndIf
Else //zerar For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CtePreCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod CteVlrPreCom = 0 CteDesIcmsCom = False CtePrePagCom = False EndFor
EndIf
commit
